channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: SpaceX vient d’entrer dans le top 5 mondial en Bourse, devant Amazon, Tesla, Samsung ou encore Meta
item.description: L’action SpaceX a explosé depuis son entrée en Bourse, propulsant l’entreprise dans le top 5 mondial. Sauf qu’avec seulement 5 % des actions en circulation, ce prix ne veut pas dire grand-chose.

item.title: SpaceX is public: Everything you need to know post-IPO
item.description: TechCrunch has followed SpaceX's start, struggles, and successes from the early days. And we're here for what happens next too. This package of SpaceX IPO coverage includes who stands to win (and maybe some who won't), pre-IPO deals, and what's tucked inside its S-1 registration document.

item.title: Game Pass en juin 2026 : voici la liste de toutes les sorties du mois
item.description: Microsoft vient de dévoiler la seconde vague des sorties de juin sur le Game Pass. Regardons de plus près ce qu'il y a au programme.

item.title: Amazon's early Prime Day TV deals are almost too good to be true — shop record-low prices on best-selling 4K and QLED TVs from $69.99
item.description: Early Prime Day TV deals are live, and I've rounded up the best offers, which include record-low prices on Amazon's best-selling 4K and QLED TVs from just $69.99.

item.title: People are starting to think ChatGPT is too cheap — and that might be a problem for OpenAI
item.description: ChatGPT's expanding capabilities and unchanged subscription price have sparked a debate over whether it's a good deal or headed for a cliff

item.title: « Stop Killing Games » : la Commission européenne répond à cette initiative portée par plus d’un million de joueurs
item.description: Après plusieurs mois de réflexion, la Commission européenne a officiellement répondu à l'initiative « Stop Killing Games ».

item.title: India orders temporary ban on Telegram over exam fraud concerns
item.description: The restrictions include a nationwide ban on Telegram until June 22 and a requirement to disable the app's message editing feature.

item.title: Apple explique enfin pourquoi Siri AI a pris autant de retard
item.description: Initialement, Apple prévoyait une mise à jour de Siri qui aurait permis quelques améliorations en matière d'IA. Après réflexion, l’entreprise à la pomme a opté pour une toute autre stratégie, à savoir une refonte de A à Z de Siri.

item.title: Quel est le meilleur iPhone en 2026 ? Comparatif et guide d’achat complet
item.description: Faut-il acheter le dernier iPhone ou bien opter pour un modèle plus ancien ? C'est à cette question que nous allons tenter de répondre dans ce guide d'achat. Quel iPhone acheter en 2026 pour avoir le meilleur rapport qualité-prix ? Voici les conseils et recommandations de la rédaction de Frandroid pour trouver le meilleur iPhone adapté à votre profil. ...

item.title: Prime Day starts now with these savings of up to 65% on Amazon devices — Echo, Ring, Fire TV, and more from $12.99
item.description: I've picked out 16 of the best early Prime Day deals at Amazon, including savings of up to 65% on these popular and best-selling Amazon devices.

item.title: AI’s impact on cognitive ability: MIT study reveals more troubling data
item.description: New research found relying too much on AI negatively affected people’s ability to identify misinformation. Yet another study shows that the more you let artificial intelligence do the thinking for you, the less capable you are on your own.

item.title: Ce forfait illimité tourne sur le meilleur réseau de France, et son prix surprend
item.description: À 17,49 euros par mois, ce forfait NRJ Mobile en série spéciale propose de la data illimitée en 5G depuis la France métropolitaine, sans engagement.

item.title: Currys dropped two incredible OLED Copilot+ laptop deals for £599 — here’s how to choose between them
item.description: The Lenovo Yoga Slim 7 Aura Edition and the Asus Vivobook S16 OLED are both £599 at Currys right now. One is compact and light, the other is big and bold. Which one is right for you?

item.title: Payments startup Flutterwave hits $3.2B valuation, backed by Ripple
item.description: African payments infrastructure company Flutterwave has hit a new valuation and landed blockchain company Ripple as investor and partner.

item.title: I fought a possessed bus in Control Resonant’s 'paranaturally warped' Manhattan, and I can’t wait to battle more funky foes
item.description: Control Resonant’s melee combat might be a first for Remedy, but it’s absolutely fantastic, and I can’t wait to unleash Dylan fully in a weird and spooky Manhattan

item.title: Why your Fire TV Stick might be slowing down (and how to fix it)
item.description: Yes, first unplug it and plug it back in. But after that, here's what you can try to fix your slow Fire TV Stick.

item.title: Encore une fuite massive de donnée de l’État français : un demi million de personnes concernées
item.description: L'État français fait face à une nouvelle fuite de données. Plus de 550 000 données personnelles de la plateforme JeVeuxAider sont dans la nature.

item.title: We now know how DJI’s dual camera Osmo Pocket 4P compares to Insta360’s
item.description: After a brief debut at the Cannes film festival last month, DJI announced all the details of its Osmo Pocket 4P stabilized camera today as part of its initial launch in China. While it doesn't match the 8K capabilities of the Insta360 Luna Ultra, the Pocket 4P features a new 1-inch sensor with improved dynamic […]

item.title: Roblox rolls out its new age-gated account tiers globally
item.description: Age-gated tiers are the latest tactic Roblox is trying to keep kids safe on its platform.

item.title: Around the World, These Building Solutions Keep Things Local
item.description: Designers are finding sustainable building solves close to home—in ancient practices and cutting-edge innovations alike.

item.title: Google says Chinese hackers cracked Workspace security to hit 'a diverse set of national, state, and private medical entities' including research and defense organizations
item.description: Google warns of ongoing data theft campaign attributed to Chinese nation-state attacker.

item.title: On a testé la Renault 4 E-Tech Plein Sud : le petit SUV électrique s’offre un grand toit en toile, mais à quel prix ?
item.description: Vous voulez rouler cheveux au vent dans une voiture électrique ? C'est possible avec la Renault 4 Plein Sud, qui n'est ni un petit SUV, ni un cabriolet. Renault a repris le concept du toit-toile rétractable, assez inédit, pour offrir une nouvelle vie à bord de sa 4L électrique. Sans perdre une once de sa polyvalence ? Lisez notre essai pour voir s'il s'agit d'un coup de foudre à ciel ouvert… ...

item.title: Do you pay for more mobile data than you actually use? The reason is psychological, says mobile data expert — here’s how to check your own data usage on iPhone or Android, and save money in the process
item.description: We speak to an expert about why underusing your mobile data allowance is often ‘psychological’ and how to save money on your monthly plan.

item.title: Amazon casse les prix avant même que le Prime Day ne commence : les meilleures offres en DIRECT
item.description: Amazon est en avance cette année. Déjà que son Prime Day est avancé à juin au lieu de juillet, l'e-commerçant américain se permet en plus de lâcher une tonne d'offres en avant-première. Nous avons fait le tri pour vous !

item.title: This Seagate IronWolf Pro deal is a fantastic Father's Day gift for anyone who runs a NAS, manages a media library, or stores huge collections of photos and videos
item.description: Newegg just knocked nearly $100 off the 20TB Seagate IronWolf Pro NAS HDD with 7200RPM performance, and a 256MB cache.

item.title: Intel CPU with integrated Nvidia RTX GPU rumored to arrive early in 2028 — and I can't wait to see this power up gaming laptops and handhelds
item.description: Can't wait for Intel's CPU with built-in Nvidia RTX graphics? Mark CES 2028 tentatively in your calendar.

item.title: Verizon Simplicity, Verizon Shine, and Verizon Dollars: What You Need to Know
item.description: Verizon introduced a new plan that costs $45 per month, revamped rewards programs, and more today.

item.title: DOJ claims xAI’s unpermitted gas turbines are a matter of ‘national, economic, and energy security’
item.description: The Justice department says the Pentagon needs xAI to keep using its unpermitted gas turbines.

item.title: In Praise of a Dumb House
item.description: Tech has been encroaching on the family domicile for years—but actor, writer, and satirist Jill Kargman is all in on analog.

item.title: The Cybercab is the lightest, most efficient Tesla ever made
item.description: Against all odds, the Tesla Cybercab is in production. And while Elon Musk's company may not have a very coherent plan for the tiny, autonomous two-seater, it's still taking the necessary steps to certify the EV's legitimacy. As such, Tesla recently filed paperwork with the Environmental Protection Agency that reveal many of the Cybercab's specs, […]...

item.title: Electronic Arts assume la pub dans ses jeux vidéo, il y en aura même de plus en plus
item.description: Electronic Arts a lancé EA Advertising, une plateforme centralisée pour intégrer de la publicité directement dans ses jeux. Visa, Red Bull, Mountain Dew sont déjà là. Et pour comprendre pourquoi maintenant, il faut regarder la dette d'EA.

item.title: Plaud says its software business topped $100M in ARR after shipping over 2M AI notetakers
item.description: Plaud is trying to make a mark in a crowded market full of AI-powered meeting notetakers.

item.title: How to watch France vs Senegal: Free Streams & TV Channels online from anywhere for FIFA World Cup 2026
item.description: Here's how to watch France vs Senegal for free online and from anywhere in Group I of the FIFA World Cup 2026.

item.title: Microsoft makes Copilot Cowork open to everyone, and wants to help you tackle even the trickiest work tasks
item.description: Microsoft and Anthropic reveal an upgraded Copilot Cowork is now generally available.

item.title: Le Roborock Saros 20 voit son prix chuter de 500 € : faut-il craquer pour cet aspirateur robot ? [Sponso]
item.description: Roborock profite du Prime Day pour afficher des promotions importantes sur nombre de ses références d’aspirateurs. Le moment est bien choisi pour s'équiper d'un robot qui prend en charge l'essentiel du ménage du sol.

item.title: Disney+ veut devenir le champion en France du dessin animé
item.description: Disney renforce le catalogue de son service de SVOD en France en signant avec ADN pour mettre la main sur de nombreux contenus japonais.

item.title: 6 things consumers should know about prices on goods now that the Iran war may be ending
item.description: Even if the tentative deal holds to end the war, experts say it’s likely high prices on gas and groceries will linger. A tentative deal to end the Iran war makes it reasonable to ask how soon prices will drop for gasoline, groceries, airline tickets and other items that got more expensive during the conflict.Not so fast, experts say.Even after oil starts flowing again from the Middle East, it could take a while for consumers to see a difference at local fuel pumps, supermarkets and other places they shop, according to economists and industry analysts.Fighting over the Strait of Hormuz disrupte...

item.title: Seagate 2TB hard drive deal: This $130 portable storage deal includes a crucial data protection perk
item.description: A pocket-sized 2TB drive with no setup required and built-in data recovery services.

item.title: Commodore made a social media-banishing flip phone
item.description: The Commodore Callback 8020 is a nostalgic rejection of modern smartphones.

item.title: Pour one out for Roku City
item.description: By this time next year, Fox Corporation CEO Lachlan Murdoch intends to have added Roku to his already expansive media empire. Should the acquisition go through, Fox will gain control of Roku's modest library of original programming, and the newly combined company will become "the third-largest player in U.S. television" in terms of viewing share. […]...

item.title: Fitbit trackers and Garmin smartwatches are down to their lowest price ever ahead of Prime Day
item.description: Ahead of Prime Day, get fitness trackers for their lowest price ever. Save up to $500 on Garmin, Fitbit, and Apple.

item.title: Boulanger casse le prix de ce PC fixe Asus ROG avec RTX 5060 et Core i5, la config idéale pour jouer en Full HD
item.description: Dans un contexte où concevoir sa propre configuration peut vite se révéler coûteux, l'Asus ROG T500MV s'impose comme une excellente solution clé en main pour les joueuses et les joueurs. Ce PC fixe s'affiche en promotion à 1 199 euros au lieu de 1 399 euros.

item.title: 10 Designers Share the Trends Defining Dwellings of Tomorrow
item.description: From friend compounds and meditation spaces to shaded outdoor areas and rooms just to make coffee, homes are getting even more multipurpose.

item.title: Robinhood’s note on 10% layoffs shows blaming AI isn’t cutting it
item.description: Unlike many of his tech industry peers who have cut thousands of jobs citing the need to restructure to make the most of AI, Robinhood's CEO Vlad Tenev conspicuously made no mention of AI in his note about layoffs.

item.title: macOS 27 beta seemingly confirms touchscreen MacBook is on its way
item.description: More evidence keeps piling up that Apple intends to finally release a touchscreen MacBook in the near future.

item.title: SpaceX is buying AI coding startup Cursor for $60 billion
item.description: SpaceX is buying Cursor to bolster the capabilities of xAI.

item.title: Private equity is buying Pizza Hut, but it’s not getting the whole pie
item.description: Parent company Yum Brands, which also owns Taco Bell and KFC, is selling off the fast food pizza chain in two big slices. Investors appear mixed on the news. Fast food company Yum Brands is selling its most iconic brand: Pizza Hut.

item.title: Xbox Game Pass additions for late June include EA Sports FC 26 and RV There Yet?
item.description: Xbox Game Pass additions for late June include EA Sports FC 26 and RV There Yet?

item.title: Après son entrée en Bourse record, Elon Musk claque 60 milliards pour Cursor, l’outil que les développeurs adorent
item.description: SpaceX rachète Anysphere, l'éditeur de Cursor, pour 60 milliards de dollars (environ 52 milliards d'euros). Elon Musk veut désormais l'outil que des millions de développeurs utilisent pour coder avec l'IA.

item.title: 20+ trading card deals to shop before Prime Day — save on Pokémon TCG, Magic, One Piece, and more
item.description: Shop the 20 best early Prime Day trading card deals at Amazon, including Pokémon TCG, Magic: The Gathering, One Piece, and KPop Demon Hunters.

item.title: The Death of the Starter Home
item.description: Buying a first house used to mark entry into adulthood—and the beginning of wealth-building. But a shifting economic landscape is threatening to close the door on this American milestone.

item.title: Canopy introduces Sound Machine + Aroma, and its already helping me sleep better
item.description: Canopy's Sound Machine + Aroma is a 3-in-1 sleep device that combines a sound machine, night light, and aromatherapy diffuser. It's available in five colors.

item.title: Speedtest : testez votre débit internet et comprenez les résultats
item.description: Un speedtest prend trente secondes. Comprendre ce que les chiffres veulent dire, et quoi en faire ensuite, c'est tout l'enjeu. Lancez le test de débit ci-dessous, on déchiffre les résultats juste après.

item.title: L’ultra-endurant Xiaomi Poco M8 Pro 5G (512 Go) perd 100 € pour l’avant-première du Prime Day
item.description: Xiaomi frappe fort avec son Poco M8 Pro 5G, un smartphone de milieu de gamme aux caractéristiques premium. Endurant, puissant et résistant, ce modèle est aussi et surtout en promotion à 309 euros au lieu de 403 euros sur Amazon.

item.title: DoorDash is down for many —here's what we know about the major outage
item.description: Both DoorDash and Spotify are experiencing issues right now, according to thousands of users —here's all the latest news.

item.title: In the age of AI-based threats, zero-trust is no longer enough
item.description: The emergence of AI-based threats means zero-trust is no longer strong enough to tackle these alone.

item.title: Microsoft forced to turn to AWS to boost GitHub cloud capacity following AI demand surge
item.description: GitHub's migration to Azure under strain as demand causes Microsoft to reach out to AWS for extra capacity.

item.title: Huawei imagine un nouveau format de smartphone pliable auquel personne ne pensait
item.description: Dans un brevet, Huawei imagine un pliable qui se replie trois fois dans le sens de la hauteur, pour devenir tout fin une fois ouvert. Un format auquel personne ne pensait.

item.title: Insta360 Luna Ultra review: Let the gimbal camera wars begin
item.description: Insta360's first gimbal camera is a high-powered Osmo Pocket rival that you can actually buy.

item.title: Kitchen deals live at Amazon ahead of Prime Day: Save on air fryers, ice cream makers, espresso machines
item.description: Kitchen gear is already on sale the week before Prime Day. Find Amazon deals on air fryers and Keurigs, plus supplies like dishwasher pods.

item.title: Florida sues TikTok for allegedly violating its social media ban for kids
item.description: The state of Florida is suing TikTok over claims the company isn't complying with the state's child safety law, which bans kids under 14 from creating social media accounts, as reported earlier by Reuters. The lawsuit, filed on Monday, alleges that TikTok still allows 13-year-olds in Florida to use the platform and is "actively deceiving" […]

item.title: Threads now has 500 million monthly users
item.description: Meta's Threads has crossed the 500 million monthly users milestone.

item.title: Facebook ajoute de l’IA à son moteur de recherche, comment ça marche ?
item.description: Meta déploie un mode IA dans le moteur de recherche Facebook. Cette fonctionnalité repose sur l’intelligence artificielle pour générer des réponses à partir des publications, groupes, reels et annonces marketplace.

item.title: What Do Americans Spend on Housing?
item.description: WIRED surveyed readers on their housing costs. The answers paint a stark portrait of unaffordability, climate adaptation, and the death of the homeowner dream.

item.title: My Father Wants to Age in Place. AI Will Be Watching
item.description: Devices that monitor seniors for safety are appealing to worried loved ones and underresourced home care agencies.

item.title: Need a New Lamp? Here Are 7 Bright Ideas
item.description: These clever lights—each one an exemplar of innovation in materials, design, and function—will beautify your home.

item.title: Designing the Dream House of an 87-Year-Old Tech Visionary
item.description: An icon of Silicon Valley’s counterculture, Stewart Brand is confronting his final years in a home that embodies the self-sufficient, DIY ethos of his famous Whole Earth Catalog.

item.title: Traditional Home Insurance Is Collapsing. Here’s What Could Fill the Gap
item.description: A new, AI-assisted model of insurance is quietly exploding in disaster-prone areas—and may be coming for FEMA too. Is it the answer to climate change, or a trap?

item.title: What Do We Need From Our Homes Right Now?
item.description: The global editorial directors of WIRED and Architectural Digest on teaming up to help you understand how we live today, and what comes next.

item.title: Amazon’s capable sound system is over $100 off ahead of Prime Day
item.description: Built-in television speakers are almost always underwhelming, so getting a soundbar is the best way to elevate any and all content. If you want to get the most for your money, Amazon’s Fire TV Soundbar Plus with a subwoofer and satellite speakers provide a bigger sound than a standalone soundbar like a Sonos Beam. Ahead […]

item.title: Dutton Ranch episode 7 trailer queues up the next big problem for 10 Petal Ranch — and fans are convinced that Beulah's successors will have a Yellowstone connection
item.description: The trailer for Dutton Ranch episode 7 teases who will be next in line to lead 10 Petal Ranch — and fans think they've worked out who it is.

item.title: Italy is probing Apple over iCloud services like iPhone backups
item.description: Apple is being investigated by the EU again, this time over its iCloud service.
